none.justification: Lists all 10 GT references across both src/utils/eloop.c and src/utils/eloop_win.c with the correct line numbers and distinguishes the 2 definitions plus 8 call sites. It also correctly states there are no string-literal or comment false positives.

ccodegraph.justification: Matches the GT set exactly: both backend files, all 10 file:line entries, 2 definitions and 8 call sites, with no false positives. The extra note about 8 call edges plus 2 definitions is consistent with the GT, not a recall error.

lsp.justification: Gives all 10 GT references with the correct file:line locations across both platform backends and correctly reports no comments or string literals. Its note that eloop_win.c was verified outside clangd does not affect correctness.
